phrases.text_local: Má Becher's Bar dnes večer otevřeno?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff give direct yes/no answers with a closing time when asked.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the spa treatment desk?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech directions often use landmarks like the main reception desk.

likely_response.local: Vlevo za hlavní recepcí, po schodech dolů.
likely_response.translation_en: Left past the main reception, down the stairs.

responses.english: Left past the main reception, down the stairs.
responses.local: Vlevo za hlavní recepcí, po schodech dolů.

phrases.intent_en: How do I reserve at Grand Restaurant?
phrases.text_local: Jak si mohu rezervovat Grand Restaurant?
phrases.cultural_note: Internal hotel phone extensions are commonly used for restaurant bookings.

likely_response.local: Zavolejte na linku 1100 nebo se stavte u concierge.
likely_response.translation_en: Call extension 1100 or stop by the concierge.

responses.english: Call extension 1100 or stop by the concierge.
responses.local: Zavolejte na linku 1100 nebo se stavte u concierge.

phrases.cultural_note: Locals refer to the connected building by its historic name.

likely_response.local: V Hotelu Splendide, vedlejší budově napravo.
likely_response.translation_en: In Hotel Splendide, the next building on the right.

responses.english: In Hotel Splendide, the next building on the right.
responses.local: V Hotelu Splendide, vedlejší budově napravo.
